Definition: Anatomical areas captured in the images. See DICOM tag (0018, 0015) Body Part Examined.
Usage note: The controlled vocabulary is defined by the subclasses of the range 'eucaim:Body Structure'' (eucaim:BP1000024). DICOM tag Body Part Examined (0018,0015) contains values in free text or mapped to SNOMED-CT, which both would have to be mapped to the EUCAIM hyperontology.

Definition: Boolean to signify if a contrast agent has been used.
Free-text description of the scan protocol.
Name of the contrast agent that has been used. See DICOM tag (0018, 1010) Contrast/Bolus Agent.
Usage note: Vocabulary to be determined, for example: http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/NCIT_C69294 or https://dicom.nema.org/medical/dicom/current/output/chtml/part16/sect_CID_12.html

Definition: Minimum and maximum value of the physical distance in the patient between the center of each pixel in millimeters in the rows direction, per slice.
Minimum and maximum value of the physical distance in the patient between the center of each pixel in millimeters in the columns direction, per slice.
Minimum and maximum value of the size of the number of rows in the images in the scans. See DICOM tags (0028, 0010) Rows.
Minimum and maximum value of the number of columns in the images in the scans. See DICOM tags (0028,0011) Columns.
Minimum and maximum value of the number of slices in the scans.
Minimum and maximum value of the pixels or voxels in the X-dimension in millimeters. See DICOM tags (0018, 0050) Slice Thickness and (0028, 0030) Pixel Spacing.
Minimum and maximum value of the pixels or voxels in the Y-dimension in millimeters. See DICOM tags (0018, 0050) Slice Thickness and (0028, 0030) Pixel Spacing.
Minimum and maximum value of the pixels or voxels in the Z-dimension in millimeters. See DICOM tags (0018, 0050) Slice Thickness and (0028, 0030) Pixel Spacing.
